ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant and consistent with the persona but lacks a bit of naturalness in phrasing, overall quality remains good. Short note: Response could be more direct to match Gatekeeper's tone.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>The response is consistent with the persona but lacks context relevance and naturalness, overall quality needs improvement. Short note: Needs to address player's request more directly while maintaining suspicion towards strangers.
the response is relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in tone
